/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/Client.dir/Client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/Network/tcp_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/Network/MessageRouter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/App/AppState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/App/Handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/App/appcontroller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/App/StateBinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/UI/loginwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/UI/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/UI/uicontroller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Client.dir/home/user/PROJECTS/common/PacketIO.cpp.o -o Client  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
